## ERT1.1. Horizontal en route flight efficiency of the actual trajectory (KEA) (KPI#1) {#ert1.1.-horizontal-en-route-flight-efficiency-of-the-actual-trajectory-kea-kpi1 .Heading-2-ER}

The Netherlands measure the same value of KEA of the previous year (2.84%), and a slight improvement for the KEA considering the effect of the war in Ukraine (2.69% in 2025 vs 2.72% in 2024). These values rank the Netherlands as 14^th^ for KEA and 21^st^ for corrected KEA.

In terms of the overall contribution to the additional distance in the SES area, the value is 1.9% (14^th^).
